name: Bunny Bistro
author: Poki
description: Bunny Bistro is a management game where you play as a hardworking bunny running the coziest little café! Start with just one table and a coffee machine, serve all sorts of cute animal customers, and collect payments to grow your business. Use your earnings to expand, buy new furniture and equipment, and hire assistants to help out. Keep everything clean too, some customers can be a little messy! Ready to hop into café life? How to play Bunny Bistro Use WASD, the arrow keys or the joystick to move. Who created Bunny Bistro Bunny Bistro is created by Angelo Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Bunny Market and Bunny Farm ! How can I play Bunny Bistro for free? You can play Bunny Bistro for free on Poki. Can I play Bunny Bistro on mobile devices and desktop? Bunny Bistro can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
